name: dhh-vibecoding
description: Vibecoding with the DHH philosophy. 11 skills distilled from 37signals' Fizzy, Campfire, and Writebook — zero build tools, no devise, no Sidekiq, no Redis, no Tailwind. Teaches Claude Code to write Rails 8 + Hotwire + Solid Suite + Kamal apps the DHH way, plus harden VPS deployments with Tailscale + Cloudflare.
